title: ononis spinosa var. procurrens
intro: Ononis spinosa var. procurrens, also known as the Burmed bush or wild sweetpea, is a flowering plant species in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa var. procurrens include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, alleviate digestive problems, and reduce symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
